title: Wildcat Strike at Sangarédi
description: Unplanned labor strike at primary bauxite extraction facility halts daily operations. Rail transport suspended.

title: Sichuan Hydro Power Rationing
description: Local government announces Stage 3 power rationing due to severe drought. Smelters instructed to curtail 20% capacity.

title: Sanctions Impact Routing
description: New international financial sanctions block primary payment routing for Russian aluminum exports, freezing shipments.

title: Cyclone Warning: Maputo
description: Category 4 Cyclone approaching. Mozal aluminum smelter activating emergency controlled shutdown procedures.

title: Tailings Dam Inspection
description: Regulators temporarily suspend Albras operations pending an emergency inspection of a suspected tailings dam irregularity.

title: National Rail Strike
description: Canadian rail strike threatens to disrupt ingot transport from Kitimat smelter to major US automotive manufacturing hubs.

title: Shanxi Environmental Audit
description: Surprise provincial environmental audit forces temporary 15% capacity reduction at major alumina refineries.

title: Grid Failure: Mt. Holly
description: A localized grid failure caused a 4-hour total blackout. Assessing potline damage and recovery timelines.

title: Pinjarra Maintenance Extended
description: Unplanned secondary maintenance required on calciner 3. Outage extended by an additional 14 days.

title: Coal Supply Bottleneck
description: Domestic coal shortages threaten captive power plants. Spot energy prices spike, squeezing margins for local smelters.

title: Earthquake: Sumatra Coast
description: Magnitude 6.2 earthquake reported. PT Inalum conducting structural integrity checks. Minor operational delays expected.

title: EGA Capacity Expansion
description: Al Taweelah successfully brings new high-efficiency potline online ahead of schedule, slightly easing regional billet tightness.

title: Port Congestion: Queensland
description: Heavy marine traffic and bulk loader maintenance causing 4-day anchorage delays for vessels loading bauxite.

title: European Carbon Tax Hike
description: Revised ETS carbon floor pricing takes effect, tightening margins for non-renewable powered smelting operations.

title: San Juan Port Strike
description: Stevedore union initiates rolling 4-hour work stoppages, delaying primary aluminum ingot exports by 48 hours.

title: Hydro Grid Maintenance
description: Scheduled high-voltage transmission maintenance forces Sunndal smelter to reduce draft by 5% for 48 hours.

title: Bauxite Export Ban Rumors
description: Local media reports suggest the government may tighten bauxite export quotas for Q2 to force domestic refinery investment.

title: Gladstone Freight Delay
description: A derailment on the regional rail network restricts bauxite inflow to the refinery. Utilizing safety stock.

title: Ma'aden Renewable Transition
description: Facility signs major PPA for solar energy integration, expected to lower long-term Scope 2 emissions and stabilize costs.

title: Renukoot Output Beats Target
description: Q4 production figures indicate the refinery exceeded output targets by 4% due to process optimization.
